title: Autonomous Legged Robot for Contour and Stair Exploration
description: A specialized legged robotics project designed to navigate steep vertical obstacles and uneven terrain, such as stairs.

title: Smart Irrigation System Prototype
description: An IoT-based smart irrigation system developed using an ESP32 microcontroller to monitor soil moisture levels in real time. This system features automatic irrigation control via a relay-controlled pump using a threshold-based method, as well as data integration with an IoT dashboard for remote monitoring.

title: SOS Bracelet
description: IoT wearable safety device. It functions as a panic button system that instantly sends emergency notifications and location data via a BLE network to a smartphone, which then forwards the information to the cloud.

title: PID Heater Control Lab Module
description: This functional lab module was designed and built to provide electrical engineering students with a practical understanding of PID-based closed-loop control systems. The module allows users to validate PID temperature control theory through an actual hardware implementation, using active heaters and coolers for clear demonstrations.

title: 4 DOF Robotic Arm
description: A simple 4-DoF (degrees of freedom) robotic arm project designed for a children’s educational module. This robot is controlled via a smartphone.

title: Autonomus Legged SAR Robot
description: An advanced robotics project developed for the Indonesian SAR Robot Contest (KRSRI). This legged robot is designed to navigate autonomously through simulated disaster terrain, overcome various extreme obstacles, and locate victims on its own.
